title: Colors, Meeting
summary: Fields of color meeting at seams that breathe on periods of minutes — too slowly to catch, too surely to deny.
notes: Rothko for browsers. Everything moves on incommensurate 90s-6min oscillators: seam position, softness, hue, luminance. Deliberately silent — the site's first mute world. Museum wall label opens the conservator's panel (fields, pigments, tempo, seam, grain, drift + reset); settings reset on load by design. Three diegetic drift exits: label fine print, a door-shadow that surfaces in the lowest field, a glint riding the first seam.

admin.notes: Idea #24 from World Ideas.md, selected by James 2026-07-12. Draft until James approves publication.
